title: Cobbletopia smp
description: this modpack brings  pokemon to minecraft with over 1000 pokemon in including some ultrabeasts and unlike the normal cobblemon mod this one offers more gameplay and utils to enhance the feeling like the anime of pokeballs found on the ground for pokeballs
body:
smp for me and my freinds we are all pokemon lovers and will like to make are own server and have 30 players for every cobblemon starter contact me if you wont to join i might let you join
my discord is missing_texture0990_15603
ive made this to make pokemon become one with minecraft my two favoroute in one
and give all the people who wants to play cobblemon but with more things added to cobblemon this is for them to use and enjoy with freinds or by themselfe 

this modpack brings pokemon to minecraft like the anime it has all the pokemon except its types of pokemon eg (pickachu is its normal form with no new colours to it)
like the anime pokeballs found on the ground give pokeball loot
there are over 1000 pokemon in this modpack
most ultra beast are in the game but not all
you can put acorns on trees the same acorns you use for making pokeballs
this modpack adds all the same abilities from pressing M to to change your pokemons name and moves all in the pokemon atm
it also adds mythical pokemon and legendary that have there own custom structures across the world and has tons of trainers spread across the world to battle if you have no freinds to play with and battle
it also has some pokemons mega evolution form that can be acheived with a z-ring made with a rare find in a new amythist geode the pokemon charizard raquaza have theres and make your pokemon look cooler with a new skin and also buff your pokemon

with all the mods in this modpack most of them inhance your game with shaders 3d capes sodium sodium plus just make the game feal even more better

pokemon starter types
-Fire: Strong against grass, ice, bug, and steel, but weak against water, rock, and ground 
-Grass: Strong against water, ground, and rock, but weak against fire, ice, poison, flying, and bug
-Water: Strong against fire, ground, and rock, but weak against electric and grass 

pokemon regions
Kanto, Johto, Hoenn, Sinnoh, Hisui, Unova, Kalos, Alola, Galar and Paldea.

region starter pokemon
kanto grass Bulbasaur, fire Charmander, water Squirtle:
johto Chikorita a Grass-type, Cyndaquil a Fire-type and Totodile a Water-type.
Hoenn Treecko Grass-type, Torchic Fire-type, and Mudkip Water-type.
Sinnoh Turtwig	Grass Overgrow Chimchar Fire Piplup	Water
Hisui Rowlet, the Grass/Flying, Cyndaquil Fire type, Oshawott water type
Unova Snivy grass type, Tepig fire type, Oshawott water type
Kalos Froakie water type,  Fennekin fire type, hespin grass type
Alola Rowlet Grass/Flying, Popplio water type, Litten fire type
Galar Grookey Grass type, Scorbunny Fire type, Sobble Water type
Paldea Sprigatito Grass, Fuecoco Fire, Quaxly Water type

pokemon types
Fire: Strong against grass, ice, bug, and steel, but weak against water, rock, and ground 
Flying: Strong against grass, fighting, and bug, but weak against electric, ice, and rock 
Ghost: Strong against psychic and ghost, but weak against ghost and dark 
Grass: Strong against water, ground, and rock, but weak against fire, ice, poison, flying, and bug 
Psychic: Strong against fighting and poison, but weak against bug, dark, and ghost 
Rock: Strong against bug, fire, flying, and ice, but weak against fighting, grass, ground, steel, and water 
Steel: Strong against fairy, ice, and rock, but weak against fighting, fire, and ground 
Water: Strong against fire, ground, and rock, but weak against electric and grass 
Normal: Deals more damage against no types, but takes more damage against fighting 
Fighting: Deals more damage against normal, rock, steel, ice, and dark, but takes more damage against flying, psychic, and fairy 
Poison: Deals more damage against grass and fairy, but takes more damage against ground and psychic
